# Level 3 — The Ramparts
# New mechanics: staggered rising platforms (each 3 tiles higher), enemies ON platforms,
# a pit you fall into if you miss the first jump, Vow Stone at the top of the climb
# Gap sizes: 4 tiles (safe), 5 tiles (medium). Platform height steps: 3 tiles each.
# The descending section right-side forces careful landing — no ground below.
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows
